channel.title: Survey on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Survey on Nature Works

item.title: Survey
item.description:
Checklist for surveying your site

Position Compass orientation Elevation Slope Elements Water Earth Wind, prevailing Sun Climate Features Existing plants Utilities Structures Access Situation Privacy Noise Smell Also see Forest Garden Planning Checklist PDF download 🙂 http://localhost:1313/survey/

item.title: The surveying legwork of the Ornamental #ForestGarden
item.description:
Oh, if only I could start planting the Ornamental Forest Garden straight away. But no. I need to survey the land before I make my Cunning Plan, before I get to the joy of planting.

“Never mind surveying the forest garden plot, my plants are arriving this afternoon! http://localhost:1313/blog/surveying-ornamental-forest-garden/
